description: Use this API to convert the constant MVA load for a specified grouping of network loads to a specified mixture of the constant MVA, constant current, and constant admittance load characteristics (activity CONL). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rlods = conl(sid, all, apiopt, status, loadin)
python_syntax: ierr, rlods = conl(sid, all, apiopt, status, loadin)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 2; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; used only when APIOPT is 2; 0 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation in the api. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: loadin
parameters.description: An array of four elementsNone. (input; used only when APIOPT is 2; 0.0 by default). The value of each element is percent of the load being converted in this step to be represented by the corresponding load characteristic as follows).

return_values.name: rlods
return_values.description: Returned as the number of unconverted loads remaining in the working case. if the value is nonzero after a call with apiopt = 2, and the remaining loads are to be converted, the api is called again with all = 1 and apiopt = 2. (output).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: method of conversion (used only when APIOPT is 1; 0 by default).
reconstruct loads using present voltage, then convert.
reconstruct loads using unity voltage, then convert.
a special OPF bus type code flag (used only when APIOPT is 2; 0 by default).
only Type 2 and 3 buses in subsystem.

loadin.description: percent of active power load to be converted to the constant current characteristic.
percent of active power load to be converted to the constant admittance characteristic.
percent of reactive power load to be converted to the constant current characteristic.
percent of reactive power load to be converted to the constant admittance characteristic.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
